home.title: Jagruk Mahila
home.subtitle: Empowering Women Through Knowledge and Rights
home.about_text:
Jagruk Mahila is a digital resource hub dedicated to the legal empowerment and socio-economic advancement of women.

The platform simplifies complex judicial frameworks into accessible, practical guidance — transforming intimidating legal statutes into everyday tools for personal security and agency.

It functions as a critical first point of contact for crisis support, prioritizing immediate safety through emergency triage while fostering long-term justice through informed awareness and advocacy.

cases.title: Landmark Cases
cases.banner: These cases shaped the laws that protect you today.
